allow: Bash(python -c "import google.ads.googleads; print\('google-ads library version:', google.ads.googleads.VERSION\)")

PowerShell(foreach \($u in @\('https://blottman.com/privacy-policy','https://blottman.com/privacy','https://blottman.com/privacy-policy/','https://www.blottman.com/privacy-policy'\)\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $u -Method Head -MaximumRedirection 5 -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15; Write-Output "$u -> $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Output "$u -> FAIL $\($_.Exception.Message.Split\("`n"\)[0]\)" } })

PowerShell($node = \(Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); $npm = \(Get-Command npm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if \($node\) { node --version } else { "node: NOT FOUND" }; if \($npm\) { npm --version } else { "npm: NOT FOUND" })

PowerShell($ok=$false; for\($i=0;$i -lt 30;$i++\){ try { $r=Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://localhost:3000 -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 3; if\($r.StatusCode -eq 200\){$ok=$true; break} } catch { Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 800 } }; if\(-not $ok\){ "server not ready"; exit 1 }; $h=$r.Content; "STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\)  LENGTH: $\($h.Length\)"; foreach\($s in @\('Fight your ticket','Trustpilot','Video testimonial','Recent Results','Before','What clients say','Before you just pay','Get your free quote','123\) 456-7890','tel:+11234567890'\)\){ if\($h -match [regex]::Escape\($s\)\){"FOUND: $s"} else {"MISSING: $s"} })

PowerShell($ok=$false; for\($i=0;$i -lt 40;$i++\){ try { $r=Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://localhost:3000 -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 3; if\($r.StatusCode -eq 200\){$ok=$true; break} } catch { Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 800 } }; if\(-not $ok\){ "server not ready"; exit 1 }; $h=$r.Content; "STATUS $\($r.StatusCode\)  LEN $\($h.Length\)"; foreach\($s in @\('Fight your ticket','As featured in','First ticket','What We Fight','Every ticket has a','How It Works','From ticket to','In Their Words','Recent Results','Before & After','OUT OF 5','clients say','Before you just','Get your','123\) 456-7890','Anton','Poppins'\)\){ if\($h -match [regex]::Escape\($s\)\){"ok  $s"} else {"MISS $s"} })

PowerShell($ok=$false; for\($i=0;$i -lt 30;$i++\){ try { $r=Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://localhost:3001 -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 3; if\($r.StatusCode -eq 200\){$ok=$true; break} } catch { Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 800 } }; if\(-not $ok\){ "not ready"; exit 1 }; $h=$r.Content; "STATUS $\($r.StatusCode\)  LEN $\($h.Length\)"; foreach\($s in @\('Fight your ticket','As featured in','First ticket','What We Fight','Every ticket has a','How It Works','From ticket to','In Their Words','Recent Results','OUT OF 5','clients say','Before you just','Get your','123\) 456-7890'\)\){ if\($h -match [regex]::Escape\($s\)\){"ok   $s"} else {"MISS $s"} }; "anton-font-class: " + \([regex]::Matches\($h,'__Anton'\)\).Count; "poppins-font-class: " + \([regex]::Matches\($h,'__Poppins'\)\).Count)

PowerShell(cd E:\\Blottman-law\\landing-v2; Start-Process -WindowStyle Hidden npm -ArgumentList 'run','dev'; $ok=$false; for\($i=0;$i -lt 40;$i++\){ try{ $p=Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 2; if\($p.StatusCode -eq 200\){$port=3000;$ok=$true;break} }catch{}; try{ $p=Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:3001" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 2; if\($p.StatusCode -eq 200\){$port=3001;$ok=$true;break} }catch{ Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 700 } }; if\(-not $ok\){"not ready";exit 1}; "PORT $port"; try{ $img=Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:$port/courthouse-bg.png" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; "courthouse-bg.png -> $\($img.StatusCode\), $\($img.RawContentLength\) bytes, type=$\($img.Headers['Content-Type']\)" }catch{ "IMAGE FETCH FAILED: $_" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; try{ $r=Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; $h=$r.Content; "page: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; foreach\($s in @\('Protect your','Get a Free Case Review','We work to protect your record and insurance rates'\)\){ if\($h -match [regex]::Escape\($s\)\){"ok   $s"}else{"MISS $s"} } }catch{ "ERR $_" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; try{ $r=Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; $h=$r.Content; "page: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; if\($h -match 'Built to protect your licence'\){"copy ok"}else{"copy MISS"} }catch{ "ERR $_" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; try{ $r=Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 6; "page: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; if\($r.Content -match 'what-we-fight-bg'\){"section bg present in HTML: YES"}else{"section bg present: NO"} }catch{ "ERR $_" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; try{ $r=Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 6; "page: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; if\($r.Content -match 'from-ink/35 via-ink to-ink/35'\){"edge-light/centre-dark overlay present: YES"}else{"overlay present: NO \(IDE may have reverted\)"} }catch{ "ERR $_" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; try{ $r=Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 6; "page: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; if\($r.Content -match 'offence-careless'\){"careless image wired: YES"}else{"careless image: NO"}; $img=Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:3000/offence-careless.png" -UseBasicParsing; "image file: $\($img.StatusCode\)" }catch{ "ERR $_" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; try{ $r=Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 6; "page: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; if\($r.Content -match 'offence-fail-stop'\){"fail-stop wired: YES"}else{"NO"}; if\($r.Content -match 'Based on  reviews'\){"WARN: reviews value missing"} }catch{ "ERR \(page may be erroring\): $_" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; try{ $r=Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 6; "page: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; foreach\($s in @\('Tickets Handled','Fixed Fees','No Surprises','Ontario Paralegal','Free Case Review'\)\){ if\($r.Content -match [regex]::Escape\($s\)\){"ok  $s"}else{"MISS $s"} } }catch{ "ERR $_" })

PowerShell(try{ $h=\(Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 6\).Content; "has hero text: " + \($h -match 'Fight your ticket'\); "opacity:0 occurrences: " + \([regex]::Matches\($h,'opacity:0'\)\).Count; "has nextjs error overlay: " + \($h -match '__next_error__|nextjs__container_errors'\) }catch{ "ERR $_" })

PowerShell($ok=$false; for\($i=0;$i -lt 40;$i++\){ try{ $r=Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 3; if\($r.StatusCode -eq 200\){$ok=$true;break} }catch{ Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 900 } }; if\($ok\){ "READY on 3000 \(status 200\)" }else{ "not ready" })
